evaluators.name: Cheapest Qualifying DAF Added to Quote List
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added a DAF unit handling ≥50 m³/h, priced ≤$80,000, and that it is the cheapest qualifying DAF in the catalog, to their current quote list.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Suitable Line for 30 m³/h with Budget Rule
evaluators.description: Checks that the user selected the cheapest suitable screening unit, dosing skid, and sludge dewatering unit for ~30 m³/h, and applied the rule to remove the single most expensive item only if their combined total exceeds $150,000.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Qualifying MBR Maintenance Plan Added
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added a Germany MBR maintenance plan with ≤24h response and annual cost ≤€6,000 to their service inquiry, and that it is the cheapest qualifying plan.

evaluators.name: Most Recent 2023 F&B Case Study ≥100 m³/d Saved
evaluators.description: Checks that the user saved a 2023 food & beverage case study with capacity ≥100 m³/day and that it is the most recently published qualifying case study.

evaluators.name: Equalization Tank Calculator Used and Correct Tank Added
evaluators.description: Checks that the user ran the equalization tank sizing calculator with the specified inputs (75 m³/h, peak factor 2.5, buffer 4 h) and added the cheapest tank in the recommended series with volume ≥750 m³ and closest to that volume to the quote list.

evaluators.name: Compare Two Cheapest pH Systems and Quote Lower NaOH One
evaluators.description: Checks that the user compared the two cheapest pH neutralization systems under $40,000 and submitted a quote request for the one with the lower NaOH consumption (kg/h).

evaluators.name: Distributor Search and Nearest Contact Viewed
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched for industrial wastewater distributors near ZIP 75201 with radius ≤200 km and opened the contact details for the closest distributor returned by that search.

evaluators.name: Register for June PFAS Webinar in 10:00–12:00 Slot with Correct Details
evaluators.description: Checks that the user registered for a PFAS treatment webinar in June 2025 starting between 10:00 and 12:00 and used the specified attendee details.
